indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: Couch is not suitable for sleep due to its lack of back support and potential for discomfort.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: Bright artificial lighting can disrupt sleep patterns and cause eye strain.

indicators.name: bench
indicators.rationale: Bench is not suitable for sleep due to its lack of back support and potential for discomfort.

indicators.name: potted plant
indicators.rationale: Potted plant is not suitable for sleep due to its potential to attract pests and allergens.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: Chair is not suitable for sleep due to its lack of back support and potential for discomfort.

indicators.name: window
indicators.rationale: Window allows natural light to enter, which can disrupt sleep patterns.

indicators.name: ceiling
indicators.rationale: Ceiling is too high and open, which can make the space feel cold and unwelcoming.

indicators.name: wall
indicators.rationale: Wall is too high and open, which can make the space feel cold and unwelcoming.

indicators.name: floor
indicators.rationale: Floor is too hard and flat, which can make the space feel cold and unwelcoming.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of a couch, bench, chairs, and potted plant indicates a focus on other activities, while the bright artificial lighting, open window, and high ceiling contribute to an unwelcoming and potentially disruptive environment. The lack of a bed or other sleep-friendly furniture makes this space unsuitable for sleep.
